agents.name: Executive Synthesizer
agents.description: Coordinates the HOA audit pipeline and synthesizes the final Report Schema v2.0 layout.
agents.instruction: Enforce Report Schema v2.0 fill order, verify cross-referencing constraints XR-1 through XR-6, and perform mathematical extraction verification.

agents.name: Financial Specialist
agents.description: Parses financials and reserve studies to extract monthly dues, reserve funding ratios, and special assessments.
agents.instruction: Extract monthly fees, underfunded reserves, and pending assessments. Strict ban on AI-generated math totals.

agents.name: Legal Specialist
agents.description: Audits CC&Rs, bylaws, and resale certificates to catch lease caps and pet restrictions.
agents.instruction: Identify lease occupancy limits, short-term lease restrictions, pet count limits, and weight limits.
